title: GTM Engineer
description: Gradient Labs seeks a GTM Engineer with an enterprise SaaS operations background and 5+ years in rev ops, marketing ops, or sales ops at an enterprise SaaS company. You'll need a systems-building instinct—thinking in workflows and turning half-built things into compounding systems. Fluency in tools like HubSpot, Clay, and Apollo is expected, though the operation matters more than the tools. Genuine AI fluency is essential: strong prompting, comfort building small agents, and creativity about applying AI. A fast pace, bias to action, and high ownership are required.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps with proven expertise in systems-building, pipeline forecasting, and GTM aligns perfectly with Gradient Labs' GTM Engineer role. His strong HubSpot/Salesforce foundation and demonstrated ability to turn fragmented operations into compounding systems directly matches their core need, and his AI-native GTM background addresses their requirement for genuine AI fluency.
ai_opener: Hi Gradient Labs team—I've spent 15+ years building RevOps systems at scale in B2B SaaS, and your GTM Engineer role caught my attention because it's exactly the kind of systems-thinking work I thrive on. I'm particularly drawn to your emphasis on AI fluency and operations velocity; I've spent the last few years building AI-native GTM workflows and have hands-on experience with prompting, agent building, and creative AI applications in revenue systems. I'd love to explore how my background in turning half-built operations into compounding engines could accelerate Gradient Labs' growth.

title: Director, GTM Tech and Automation
description: Ivo, an AI contract review and intelligence platform winning in enterprise legal, seeks a Director of GTM Tech and Automation to build, automate, and operate its entire go-to-market systems layer—AI-first. You'll architect the tech stack, deploy AI-powered workflows, and own CRM architecture, cross-platform integrations, and data pipelines connecting product usage to revenue. Requires 5–10 years in B2B SaaS GTM operations, deep SFDC administration (complex flows, custom objects), strong SQL for production queries, fast code shipping with AI copilots, and end-to-end automation across SFDC, HubSpot, and BigQuery.
score_reason: Exceptional match on core competencies: 15+ years B2B SaaS exceeds 5-10yr requirement, deep Salesforce admin expertise aligns perfectly with complex SFDC architecture needs, and AI-native GTM focus directly matches Ivo's AI-first contract intelligence platform. Remote location is ideal, and Director-level scope matches seniority.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years architecting GTM tech stacks for B2B SaaS, and Ivo's approach to AI-powered contract intelligence resonates deeply. Your need for someone who can own the entire SFDC-to-revenue data pipeline while shipping AI-first workflows is exactly where I've been operating lately—I'd love to explore how we can scale GTM automation at your pace.

title: Growth Marketing Campaigns Manager
location: Remote (Offices in SF, NYC, London, Dublin, Tel Aviv, Sydney)
description: Vanta, a security and compliance automation platform, seeks a Growth Marketing Campaigns Manager to take big GTM moments—product launches, vertical pushes, field events—and turn them into pipeline. You'll own campaigns end-to-end from idea and build through channels, budget, and debrief. Requires 5+ years in B2B SaaS demand generation or growth marketing with shipped campaigns, ownership of integrated programs (email, paid, lifecycle, events), strong campaign data fluency, real working relationships with Sales, SDR, creative, and Product Marketing, and hands-on proficiency in HubSpot and Salesforce.
score_reason: Strong technical alignment (HubSpot/Salesforce, B2B SaaS, pipeline focus, GTM expertise) and ideal location, but role is Growth Marketing Campaigns Manager—a lateral or step-back from Omri's senior RevOps/Head of Revenue Operations trajectory. This is an IC/manager role in demand gen, not a strategic RevOps or GTM leadership position.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I noticed Vanta is scaling security and compliance automation—a category where clean, predictable pipeline is everything. With 15+ years building GTM engines and deep HubSpot/Salesforce expertise, I've scaled demand gen from strategy through execution, but I'm typically operating at the Revenue Operations or Head of Growth level where I own the full funnel and forecast. I'm curious if there's appetite to evolve this role toward a broader GTM Operations or RevOps mandate where I could drive campaigns *and* the systems/processes behind them.

title: Manager, GTM Operations (RevOps)
description: Iru is hiring a Manager, GTM Operations to lead the RevOps function—owning the systems, data, and processes that keep its revenue engine accurate and scalable. You'll own marketing operations (lifecycle, scoring, attribution, funnel reporting) and customer success operations, lead sales planning (territory design, quota setting, capacity planning), and partner with GTM Engineering on automation. This player-coach role manages one direct report. Requires 5–8 years in Revenue/GTM Operations in B2B SaaS, deep HubSpot and/or Salesforce proficiency, BI tool experience (Hex, Looker, Mode), and familiarity with workflow tools like n8n or Zapier.
score_reason: Exceptional match—Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps, deep HubSpot/Salesforce expertise, and player-coach leadership experience directly align with this Manager, GTM Operations role. The scope (marketing ops, CS ops, sales planning, GTM Engineering partnership) is precisely his wheelhouse, though BI tool depth should be confirmed.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I came across Iru's Manager, GTM Operations role and it immediately resonated—your focus on building accurate, scalable revenue systems mirrors exactly what I've spent 15+ years architecting in B2B SaaS. I've led similar player-coach RevOps teams managing the full lifecycle from marketing ops and attribution through sales planning and automation partnerships, and I'm particularly intrigued by your GTM Engineering collaboration model—that's where I've seen the most leverage in modern revenue orgs.

title: Senior Sales Operations Manager
description: Anyscale, the company behind Ray (the open-source AI compute framework), is hiring a Senior Sales Operations Manager to support its high-growth B2B SaaS revenue organization. The role focuses on optimizing sales processes, pipeline management, forecasting, and CRM operations to scale the go-to-market motion. Ideal candidates bring strong analytical skills, Salesforce proficiency, and cross-functional collaboration experience with Sales, Marketing, and Finance teams in a fast-paced AI/SaaS environment. (Full job details available on the application page.)
score_reason: Exceptional match for Omri's RevOps expertise—Senior Sales Operations Manager at an AI-native, high-growth B2B SaaS company directly aligns with his target roles and requires the exact skill set (Salesforce, pipeline forecasting, CRM optimization) he excels at. Remote flexibility and fast-paced GTM environment are ideal for his profile.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building RevOps and GTM functions at scale in B2B SaaS, and Anyscale's mission to democratize AI compute is compelling. With strong Salesforce expertise and a track record optimizing pipeline forecasting and sales processes in high-growth environments, I'm interested in how I could support Ray's go-to-market expansion.

title: Senior Sales Operations Manager (f/m/d)
description: Moss, a B2B SaaS spend management and corporate card platform, is hiring a Senior Sales Operations Manager to drive operational excellence across its sales organization. The role involves optimizing sales processes, pipeline and forecasting rigor, CRM administration, and cross-functional alignment with Marketing and Finance to support scaling revenue across European markets. Ideal candidates bring strong analytical capabilities, CRM expertise, and experience in high-growth SaaS sales operations environments. (Full job details available on the application page.)
score_reason: Strong alignment with core RevOps competencies (pipeline forecasting, CRM admin, sales process optimization, cross-functional alignment) in a B2B SaaS fintech context. Remote Europe role fits location preferences, though slightly outside primary focus areas.
ai_opener: Omri here—15+ years scaling B2B SaaS revenue operations. I've built and optimized sales forecasting and CRM systems through multiple scaling phases, and your spend management focus resonates given my fintech background. I'd be interested in exploring how I could drive operational rigor across Moss's European sales org.
